raw_consumer_statement:
Dear Citibank Dispute Department, I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to formally request the immediate reopening of my dispute against the merchant Get XXXX XXXX concerning an outstanding charge of {$250.00}. 

XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX I am increasingly concerned that my previous dispute was not handled with the attention and care that customers deserve. The purchase I made was for an airport pickup service. Upon my arrival, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXfter reaching out to the merchant, I was informed that they do not operate on XXXX, which is when my pickup was scheduled. This information was not communicated to me at the time of purchase, leading to a significant inconvenience and financial loss. 

I promptly requested the merchant to cancel my order and issue a refund. However, they have refused multiple times to accommodate my request, leaving me stranded without the service I paid for. 

Subsequently, I contacted Citibank to dispute this charge, under the assumption that a thorough investigation would be conducted. To my surprise and disappointment, my dispute was closed without any communication from your team regarding the merchant 's response or any efforts to reach out to me for clarification. 

I kindly urge you to reconsider my case and conduct a more comprehensive investigation. It is crucial for me to receive the service I paid for or a proper refund, as the current outcome is unsatisfactory and does not reflect the standard of service I expect from Citibank. 

Thank you for your attention to this matter. I look forward to your prompt response and hope for a resolution soon. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX
